title: corunastylis psammophila
intro: Corunastylis psammophila, also known as the desert helmet orchid, is a rare and unique species of flowering plant native to Western Australia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Corunastylis psammophila include soothing and calming effects on the skin, as well as providing relief from minor cuts and scrapes. The plant can be prepared in herbal form through infusions or decoctions, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
